subject: fix(engine,a11y): comprehensive codebase review fixes
body:
Fix critical engine bugs, add accessibility across all modals and views,
and improve import UX.

Engine fixes:
- Replace order-blind character-presence fuzzy scoring with Levenshtein distance
- Fix Math.min→Math.max in medium-confidence matching (was over-matching)
- Fix weekly/daily projection using Date objects instead of day-of-month arithmetic
- Fix variance threshold comment (0.005 is half-cent rounding, not 5%)
- Strengthen import validation (checks periodType, startDate, expense fields)
- Add monthLabels bounds check in variance

Accessibility:
- Add role="dialog"/role="alertdialog" + aria-modal to all 3 modal components
- Add focus trapping and Escape-to-close via new useDialogA11y composable
- Add role="alert" to all error banners across all 10 views
- Add aria-label to icon-only buttons (edit, delete, dismiss, help)
- Add ARIA combobox pattern + keyboard nav to category autocomplete
- Add colorblind-safe text labels to CompareTab bar charts

Architecture:
- Add 404 catch-all route (redirect to budget list)
- Add import pagination (50/page) and skipped row feedback
- Create reusable ErrorAlert, LoadingSpinner, EmptyState components
- Fix localStorage key inconsistency (tutorial now uses budgy-ting: prefix)

Tags: bugfix, accessibility, engine, matching, projection, variance, a11y, ux
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: codebase-review
Semver: minor
